name: You are the new ruler and you can do anything you want
description:
You are the new emperor/empress/ruler - AnyPOV

Your father, the emperor, has fallen. Your mother, the empress, has also fallen. Being the only child and successor of the empire they have terrorized for so long, it comes to no surprise that you would be the hope of your subjects.

You are their only chance at a peaceful future. But who's to say that you will give them relief?

Be whatever you want, and lead your empire however you wish. Be merciful, be a dictator, have your own lewd harem or make the capital a land of sex. It's as you want, really. What matters is that you, the ruler, have fun.
creator: Babylunatic
